summary: This document contains exercises from Session 1 of an international finance or foreign exchange course. The questions cover fundamental FX concepts including exchange rate appreciation/depreciation, percentage changes in currency values, forward exchange rate calculation using interest rate parity, and covered interest arbitrage.
bullets: Question 1.1 tests understanding of euro depreciation against the USD and its effect on European purchasing power for U.S. goods
Questions 1.2 and 1.3 require calculating percentage appreciation/depreciation for the Korean won and Zimbabwe dollar respectively
Question 1.4 applies covered interest rate parity to compute one-year and one-month forward $/€ exchange rates from Eurocurrency market rates
Question 1.5 asks for a three-month forward SKr/USD quote and the annualized forward premium or discount on the dollar
Question 1.6 presents market data and asks whether covered interest arbitrage opportunities exist, requiring description of the arbitrage flows
